artifact_probe.description: Inspects existing PAS benchmark JSON; does not launch production solves.

bounded_real_solve_probe.description: Opt-in subprocess layer using benchmark_pas_tz_memory_fallback.py; default planning launches no solves.

gates.promotion_policy: real-solve candidates must not regress elapsed_s or max_rss_mb against baseline when default promotion is required

bounded_real_solve_probe.selection_policy: ready requested targets in production-floor order until the total wall-time budget is exhausted
